children.name:
AssertionError: 'token' key missing from login response. Got: {'error': 'rate_limit_exceeded', 'message': "You've hit the free-tier limit of 250 requests/day.", 'upgrade': {'message': 'Lite ($5/mo): 10,000 requests/day with commercial use license. Building a backend? See Dev ($12/mo).', 'url': 'https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api&highlight=lite', 'pricing_url': 'https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&highlight=lite'}, 'current_usage': {'requests_today': 250, 'daily_limit': 250, 'resets_at': '2026-05-12T00:00:00.000Z'}, 'limit': 250, 'remaining': 0, 'reset_at': 1778544000, 'resets_in': '14h 51m', 'reset_explanation': 'Limits reset daily at midnight UTC', 'upgrade_url': 'https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api', 'recommended_plan': 'dev', 'why_this_happened': 'Free tier includes 250 requests/day. Upgrade for higher limits, persistent collections, auth, and logs.', 'tier': 'free', '_meta': {'powered_by': 'ReqRes', 'docs_url': 'https://app.reqres.in/documentation', 'upgrade_url': 'https://app.reqres.in/upgrade', 'example_url': 'https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app', 'variant': 'v1_b', 'message': 'Too many requests. Back off, or use Projects for higher limits.', 'cta': {'label': 'Get started', 'url': 'https://app.reqres.in/upgrade'}, 'context': 'rate_limited'}}
assert 'token' in {'_meta': {'context': 'rate_limited', 'cta': {'label': 'Get started', 'url': 'https://app.reqres.in/upgrade'}, 'docs_url': 'https://app.reqres.in/documentation', 'example_url': 'https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app', ...}, 'current_usage': {'daily_limit': 250, 'requests_today': 250, 'resets_at': '2026-05-12T00:00:00.000Z'}, 'error': 'rate_limit_exceeded', 'limit': 250, ...}

AssertionError: Expected string token, got NoneType
assert False
 +  where False = isinstance(None, str)

AssertionError: Token too short: '' (len=0)
assert 0 > 5
 +  where 0 = len('')

AssertionError: Expected 400 when password is missing, got 429
assert 429 == 400
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

AssertionError: Expected 400 when email is missing, got 429
assert 429 == 400
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty login payload, got 429
assert 429 == 400
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

AssertionError: [TC_USR_CREATE_001] Create user with valid name and job
    Expected 201, got 429. Body: {"error":"rate_limit_exceeded","message":"You've hit the free-tier limit of 250 requests/day.","upgrade":{"message":"Lite ($5/mo): 10,000 requests/day with commercial use license. Building a backend? See Dev ($12/mo).","url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api&highlight=lite","pricing_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&highlight=lite"},"current_usage":{"requests_today":250,"daily_limit":250,"resets_at":"2026-05-12T00:00:00.000Z"},"limit":250,"remaining":0,"reset_at":1778544000,"resets_in":"14h 23m","reset_explanation":"Limits reset daily at midnight UTC","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api","recommended_plan":"dev","why_this_happened":"Free tier includes 250 requests/day. Upgrade for higher limits, persistent collections, auth, and logs.","tier":"free","_meta":{"powered_by":"ReqRes","docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade","example_url":"https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app","variant":"v1_b","message":"Too many requests. Back off, or use Projects for higher limits.","cta":{"label":"Get started","url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade"},"context":"rate_limited"}}
assert 429 == 201
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_CREATE_001', 'description': 'Create user with valid name and job', 'payload': {'name': 'Alice Johnson', 'job': 'QA Engineer'}, 'expected_status': 201, 'expect_fields': ['name', 'job', 'id', 'createdAt']}
